title: Create: Magic Survival
description: A pack focused on Create, magic, and survival.
body:
This modpack delivers a rich blend of engineering, magic, and survival to create a deeply immersive Minecraft experience. At its core is the Create mod and a wide range of Create addons, enabling complex automation, transport systems, and mechanical marvels. Complementing the tech is a strong focus on magic, featuring mods like Enchanted, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, and Malum, offering diverse spellcasting and mystical progression.

The food and survival experience is fully expanded with Farmer’s Delight, Chef’s Delight, Brewin’ and Chewin’, SOL Onion, and more, bringing cooking, farming, and nourishment mechanics into play. Sophisticated Backpacks, GraveStone add vital quality-of-life improvements for adventuring.

With a visually enriched world through mods like Nature’s Spirit, The Undergarden, and Luminous Beasts, and smoother performance through Sodium, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast, this modpack ensures both beauty and stability. Whether you're building a magical farm, an automated factory, or exploring deadly dungeons, this pack has the depth and content to keep you engaged.
